title: pelargonium × daedaleum
intro: Pelargonium × daedaleum, also known as the Cape Rose or Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory qualities, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopausal hot flashes. Pelargonium × daedaleum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used topically or ingested for its medicinal and therapeutic effects.
